Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: costume accessories carried [300209275], costume accessories [300209273], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Non-Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: eyeglasses [300266808], equipment for personal vision use [300236659], personal equipment [300238982], equipment by context [300239170], equipment [300122241], Tools and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300022238], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Type of eyeglasses, often more decorative than functional, hand-held to the eye and usually mounted on a long ornamental handle.
Tipo de gafas, frecuentemente más decorativas que funcionales, sostenidas con una mano en el ojo y por lo general montadas sobre un mango largo y ornamentado.
Type bril dat vaak decoratief is en geen werkelijke functie heeft; wordt met de hand bij het oog gehouden en is vaak op een lang, ornamentaal steeltje bevestigd.
眼鏡樣式，其裝飾性通常大於功能性，以手持貼近眼睛，且通常架在裝飾用長把手上。
Eine Art von Brille, die oft mehr dekorativ als funktional verwendet wird; wird in der Hand vor dem Auge gehalten und ist in der Regel an einem langen Ziergriff befestigt.

Source.Source_ID: 2000001681/Livandi, Thesaurus of Clothing and Textile Terms, Personal Artifacts (1990)
2000010911/Detroit Art Registration and Information System Glossary (1980)
2000030201/National Museum of American History, Dictionary of Costume (n.d.)

Term_Source.Page: A form of eyeglass, often more decorative than functional. Hand held, suspen. @ neck by chain/cord.

Source.Source_ID: 2000046682/Random House Dictionary of the English Language (1987)
